response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year experience minimum and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and software engineering skills, they lack the Director-level strategic experience and recognized AI expertise demanded by this Principal Engineer role. Their background aligns more closely with a hands-on Staff or Senior Developer rather than an executive-level AI strategist shaping cloud products and advising enterprise customers.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience
Strong community engagement and technical mentorship
concerns: No recognized deep expertise in AI or machine learning
Missing executive-level customer and partner engagement
